shopping_215.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent failed to select all required product options (color and size) before attempting to add the item to the cart, as indicated by the warning message "The product's required option(s) weren't entered."
2. The agent got stuck in a repetitive loop, clicking the same "Flowers-2" radio button multiple times without selecting other necessary options or re-attempting to add to cart after selecting an option.
shopping_215.REFLECTION: When encountering a product with multiple options (e.g., color, size), always ensure all required options are selected before clicking "Add to Cart." Pay close attention to any warning or error messages, as they provide crucial information on how to proceed. Avoid repetitive actions if they do not lead to progress; instead, re-evaluate the page for missing inputs or alternative actions.
